name: six-axis-compass
description: A zero-dependency political compass mapping six axes: Cultural, Economic, Military, Sovereignty, Governance, and Class.

scripts.test: node tests/quiz.test.js && node tests/axes-order.test.js && node tests/trigrams.test.js && node tests/merch-url.test.js && node tests/printful-catalog.test.js && node tests/chart-renderer-themes.test.js && node tests/checkout-session.test.js && node tests/api.test.js
